hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); EXIT_CODE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_output.exit_code // "0"'); if [ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]; then STDERR=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_output.stderr // ""' | head -5 | tr '\n' ' '); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | head -1); echo "[Stolperstein] Command failed (exit $EXIT_CODE): $CMD — Query Stolperstein for known pitfalls: query(text=\"$(echo $STDERR | head -c 200)\")"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); COUNT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_output.count // 0'); if [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[Stolperstein] Found $COUNT matching KU(s). If any helped, confirm them with confirm(ku_id=\"...\"). If any are wrong, flag them."; fi

echo "[Stolperstein] This session has been substantial enough to trigger context compression. If you solved non-obvious problems or discovered gotchas, consider running /stolperstein:reflect before the session ends — or call reflect(session_summary=\"...\") directly with a summary of key learnings."
